hero_subtitle: SFTY organizes case data, provider outputs, regulatory triggers and audit evidence into a clear operational workflow to support management-level AML compliance reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance reporting depends on manual workflows
problem_description: Internal compliance reporting often requires manual collection and reconciliation of data from multiple disconnected sources. This slows report preparation, weakens audit trails and reduces oversight across sanctions screening, alerts, cases and suspicious activity drafts.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links provider data, alert outcomes, case decisions and regulatory rule triggers into one unified workflow, enabling compliance teams to prepare audit-ready reports with clear traceability and streamlined oversight.
workflow_title: From case creation to compliance reporting
workflow_description: SFTY moves alerts and provider outputs through structured review, case management, evidence collection and report preparation for timely internal compliance reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects screening, alerts, cases and reporting into one structured workflow that supports clear compliance decisions and audit-ready evidence for internal teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASP compliance teams a secure, auditable platform to consolidate provider data and evidence for reliable internal reporting and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support internal compliance reporting workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how cases and alerts connect to compliance reports
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports suspicious activity reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how regulatory rule changes update internal reporting
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance reporting teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures alerts, cases and internal reports into audit-ready workflows to streamline management-level AML compliance reporting for digital asset businesses like VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage case and report workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into connected cases, applies rules, records decisions and generates SAR- or STR-style draft reports within controlled compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs and case records with audit logs to support review readiness and defensible compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into one consistent compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements existing providers by turning their outputs into structured reviews, case management and reporting without replacing underlying services.
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes case data, regulatory triggers and audit evidence for management-level AML reporting workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
